titleStmt.title: SII 25.125: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 125. (A.R. No. 125 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the first prākāra in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.
The details of the date of the record viz., year 23, Tulā 17 are not sufficient for verification.

This epigraph records the sale of lands, ēmbal and kuṟichchi executed in the name of the deity Ādichaṇḍēśvara (Ādichaṇḍēśvaravilai) to the temple of Tiruttaḷiyāṇḍa-nāyaṉār by the mūlaparushaṉ-mahāsabhai of Tirupputtūr, a brahmadēya in Kēraḷaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu. The above sabhai is stated to have met in the temple and taken the measures to defalcate the amount due from a certain Villiyāṇḍāṉ-Aḻagapperumāḷ and his younger brothers of the place who did sin to the brāhmaṇas, who had engaged a widow from outside for the family, who utilised the food-offerings, the jaggery for the purpose of food-offerings to the deity Tiruttaḷiyāṇḍanāyaṉār, who met the bhaṇḍāra-mudal out of the wages accrued from the dēvadāṉa lands, who had taken away the trees felled in the dēvadāṉa lands, who had redrafted the document by assigning to their own persons of the lands that have been supervised in the village all along, etc. The remaining portion of the record is lost. The lands owned by the above individual and his brothers seem to have been confiscated on account of the atrocities committed by them and sold by the sabhai as stated above. (Also see No. 130 B of 1908).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: svastiśrī śrī maṟkittikku mel śrī komāṟavarmmarāṉa tribhuvaṉac cakravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamuṅkoṇṭaruḷiya śrī kulace

karadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 3vatu tulā nāyiṟṟu 10 7tiyati ḷ keraḷaciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyan tirupputtūr mulaparuṣaṉ mahāsabhaiyom Uṭaiyār tiruttaḷiyāṇṭa nāyaṉār śrī koyilil kūṭṭak
kuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu Uṭaiyār tiruttaḷiyāṇṭa nāyaṉārkku Āticaṇṭeśvara vilaiyāka viṟṟukkuṭutta bhūmikaḷum Empalum kuṟicciyumāvatu nammurvillā ṭāṉaḻakap perumāḷum tam
pimārum brāhmaṇya hāṇi paṇṇukaiyālum puṟadecattāḷoru brāmmaṇi vitavaiyait taṉakkuk kuṭumpamāka Ūrile vaiccum Uṭaiyār tiruttaḷi yāṇṭa nāyaṉār koyilil Amutupaṭi
cāttuppaṭi tāṉun tampimārum Eṭuttu viṉiyokaṅ koṇṭum Uṭaiyāṟku Amutu paṭikku vanta karuppu kaṭṭi miṭāvai Eṭuttukkoṇṭu poyum tevatāṉap paṟṟil Ūrvaḻi kaikkūli koṇṭu paṇṭā
ramutalaik kaḻiccuk kuṭuttum tevatāṉap paṟṟil maraṅkaḷai veṭṭittaṉṉaka meṭuttum Ūril viḷaiñca nilam Uṭaiyārāyiravar kaṇkāṇic cuvanta Aṭaivaikkiḻiccu taṉakku veṇṭuvāṟku kuṟaicceḻutikkuṭutRead nṛpam
Digital edition of SII 25.125 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
